channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 193,000 — Modern 3-Bed Townhouse with Borehole in Greendale North, Harare North (Greendale North, Harare North)
item.description: USD 193,000 — Greendale North, Harare North. 3 beds, 2 baths. Modern 3-Bed Townhouse with Borehole in Greendale North, Harare North. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Property.co.zw
